heading: Use of appropriations for road construction
label: 80d–1 Use of appropriations for road construction
text: After , no part of appropriations made for the National Park Service shall be available for road construction in Kings Canyon National Park, California, except on the floor of the canyon of the South Fork of the Kings River and the Grant Grove section of that park.June 22, 1946
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , which comprises this subchapter.act Mar. 4, 1940, ch. 4054 Stat. 41

Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions of other officers, employees, and agencies of Department of the Interior, with certain exceptions, to Secretary of the Interior, with power to delegate, see Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1950, §§ 1, 2, eff. , 15 F.R. 3174, , set out in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.May 24, 195064 Stat. 1262
